goal: set_preimage[X, Y](f, s.c) = set_preimage[X, Y](f, s).c
X.is_open(set_preimage[X, Y](f, s)) and X.is_open(set_preimage[X, Y](f, s).c)
set_preimage[X, Y](f, s) = set_preimage[X, Y](f, Set.empty_set[Y])

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: Set[T1], x2: T0) { x2 ∈ set_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0(x2) ∈ x1 }[X, Y](f, u, x)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: Set[T1], x2: T0) { x2 ∈ set_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0(x2) ∈ x1 }[X, Y](f, v, x)

goal: u.is_disjoint(v) = forall(x0: Y) { not (u.contains(x0) and v.contains(x0)) }

p.c: function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or not x2 ∈ x1 } = x0.is_disjoint(x1) }[Y](u, v)
(forall(x0: Y) { not x0 ∈ u or not x0 ∈ v } = true)
function(x0: Y) { not (x0 ∈ u and x0 ∈ v) }(f(x))

goal: not (set_preimage[X, Y](f, u).contains(x) and set_preimage[X, Y](f, v).contains(x))

p.c: function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or not x2 ∈ x1 } = x0.is_disjoint(x1) }[X](set_preimage[X, Y](f, u), set_preimage[X, Y](f, v))

goal: set_preimage[X, Y](f, u.union(v)) = set_preimage[X, Y](f, u).union(set_preimage[X, Y](f, v))
set_preimage[X, Y](f, u).union(set_preimage[X, Y](f, v)) = Set.universal_set[X]
set_preimage[X, Y](f, u).union(set_preimage[X, Y](f, v)) = Set.universal_set[X]
is_disconnection[X](X.is_open, set_preimage[X, Y](f, u), set_preimage[X, Y](f, v))
exists(k0: Set[Y]) { exists(k1: Set[Y]) { is_disconnection[Y](Y.is_open, k0, k1) } }
is_disconnection[X](X.is_open, set_preimage[X, Y](f, u), set_preimage[X, Y](f, v))
exists(k0: Set[X], k1: Set[X]) { is_disconnection[X](X.is_open, k0, k1) }

p.c: function(x0: Set[X]) { not exists(k0: Set[X]) { is_disconnection[X](X.is_open, x0, k0) } }(set_preimage[X, Y](f, u))
function(x0: Set[X], x1: Set[X]) { not is_disconnection[X](X.is_open, x0, x1) }(set_preimage[X, Y](f, u), set_preimage[X, Y](f, v))
exists(k0: Set[X], k1: Set[X]) { is_disconnection[X](X.is_open, k0, k1) }
let w0: Set[X] satisfy { exists(k0: Set[X]) { is_disconnection[X](X.is_open, w0, k0) } }
let w1: Set[X] satisfy { is_disconnection[X](X.is_open, w0, w1) }
function(x0: Bool) { (not true or x0) = x0 }(exists(k0: Set[X], k1: Set[X]) { is_disconnection[X](X.is_open, k0, k1) })
not (true and forall(x0: Set[X], x1: Set[X]) { not is_disconnection[X](X.is_open, x0, x1) }) or not exists(k0: Set[X], k1: Set[X]) { is_disconnection[X](X.is_open, k0, k1) }

goal: not exists(k0: Set[Y], k1: Set[Y]) { is_disconnection[Y](Y.is_open, k0, k1) }
